_comment: Reference list of hook definitions for the nddev-developer setup. The installer merges these into cli/config.json under the matching event key. ZCode supports exactly seven events: SessionStart, UserPromptSubmit, PreToolUse, PermissionRequest, PostToolUse, PostToolUseFailure, Stop. Each hook entry shape: { "matcher": "<ToolName|.*>", "hooks": [ { "type": "command", "command": "<shell cmd>" } ] }. Keep this file empty (no active hooks) until a hook is deliberately added.
